isolation.cartState: client-side only, isolated per browser session

steps.expected: Empty state with shopping bag icon and 'Your cart is empty' message
steps.observed: Empty state displayed correctly with ShoppingBag icon, 'Your cart is empty' text, and 'Continue Shopping' button

steps.action: Navigate to /shop/soul-seasoning-blend and click 'Add to Cart'
steps.expected: Item added to cart, cart count updates
steps.observed: Cart icon badge updated to 1, cart slide-in opened showing Soul Seasoning Blend

steps.action: Navigate to /shop/heritage-hot-sauce and click 'Add to Cart'

steps.expected: Cart page shows both items with images, names, quantity controls, prices, and remove buttons
steps.observed: Cart page displays: column headers (Product, Quantity, Unit Price, Total), Soul Seasoning Blend (qty 1, $18.00/$18.00) and Heritage Hot Sauce (qty 1, $14.00/$14.00), each with product image, name, subtitle, increment/decrement buttons, unit price, line total, and X remove button. Order Summary sidebar shown on right.

evidence.consoleErrors: Hydration mismatch warnings due to localStorage cart state differing from server-rendered empty state — expected behavior for client-side cart persistence, not a functional bug
evidence.network: Standard Next.js page loads, no API calls

steps.action: Click increment (+) button on Soul Seasoning Blend
steps.expected: Quantity increases from 1 to 2, line total updates
steps.observed: Quantity changed to 2, line total updated from $18.00 to $36.00, subtotal updated from $32.00 to $50.00, order total updated to $61.95

steps.action: Click remove (X) button on Heritage Hot Sauce
steps.observed: Heritage Hot Sauce removed, only Soul Seasoning Blend remains. Subtotal updated to $36.00, order total updated to $47.95

steps.action: Click decrement (-) button on Soul Seasoning Blend
steps.expected: Quantity decreases from 2 to 1, totals update
steps.observed: Quantity changed to 1, line total updated to $18.00, subtotal updated to $18.00, order total updated to $29.95

evidence.consoleErrors: Hydration mismatch warnings (same as VAL-ACCT-003, expected)
evidence.network: No API calls — all state is client-side React Context

steps.action: Verify order summary with 2 items (Soul Seasoning Blend qty 1 + Heritage Hot Sauce qty 1)
steps.observed: Order Summary shows Subtotal: $32.00, Estimated Delivery: $11.95, ORDER TOTAL: $43.95 — all correct

steps.action: Increment Soul Seasoning Blend to qty 2
steps.observed: Subtotal updated to $50.00, ORDER TOTAL updated to $61.95 — correct
Subtotal updated to $36.00, ORDER TOTAL updated to $47.95 — correct

steps.action: Decrement Soul Seasoning Blend to qty 1
steps.observed: Subtotal updated to $18.00, ORDER TOTAL updated to $29.95 — correct

evidence.consoleErrors: Hydration mismatch warnings (same as above, expected)
evidence.network: No API calls — all calculations are client-side

summary: Tested 3 assertions: 3 passed. Cart page renders correctly with empty state and populated state, quantity controls (increment/decrement/remove) work as expected with real-time total updates, and order summary calculates subtotal + delivery fee + order total correctly and updates dynamically.
